heading: Unsharded Collections in Global Write Clusters
body:
Global Clusters provide the same support for unsharded
collections as a standard Atlas sharded cluster. For each
database in the cluster, MongoDB stores its unsharded collections
on a [primary shard](manual/reference/glossary). Use [sh.status()](manual/reference/method/sh.status) from
[mongosh](mongodb-shell) to determine the primary shard for the database.
